author: Maxime Janton
subject: Feat/instantsearch.js/unify connector api (#2107)
body:
* refactor(price-ranges): `refine(from, to)` -> `refine({from, to})`
* refactor(toggle): `refine(facetValueToRefine, isRefined)` -> `refine(facetValue)`
* fix(toggle): `createURL` wasnt returning a string but a fn
* refactor(connectRefinementList): remove `currentRefinement`
* refactor(connectNumericRefinementList): remove `currentRefinement`
* refactor(connectPriceRanges): remove `currentRefinement`
* refactor(connectStarRating): remove `currentRefinement`
* fix(connectToggle): compute `count` correctly when no `off` value

* fix(connectClearAll): provide same fn reference for `clearAll`

* fix(connectClearAll): provide working `clearAll` fn at first render

* feat(connectCurrentRefinedValues): compute label with `displayedOperator`

* fix(custom-widgets/hierarchicalMenu): remove useless `map` on `item[]`

* refactor(hits): remove `hitsPerPage` 🔥

* refactor(hitsPerPageSelector): rename `options[]` to `items[]`

* fix(dev.demo): use `items` for `hitsPerPageSelector`

* chore(connectClearAll): vanilla example can now be simpler

same function reference, so it can be bound once

* chore(connectSearchBox): vanilla example can be simpler

* refactor(hitsPerPage): remove `currentRefinement` provide `items[i].isRefined`

* refactor: rename `connectHitsPerPageSelector` -> `connectHitsPerPage`

* fix(connectSearchBox): rename search to refine

It's more similar to the other refinements

note: this is a breaking change

* feat(connectHitsPerPage): replace console.log by console.warn

It's shown as a warning, and in yellow. Supported from IE8

* feat(connectCurrentRefinedValues): provide `createURL(item)` && `clearRefinement(item)`

* test(clearAll): `clearAll()` is no more noop on init

* feat(connectCurrentRefinedValues): support `clearsQuery` opt

* fix(connectCurrentRefinedValues): support `clearsQuery` into `clearAllURL`

* refactor(utils): pass `clearsQuery` to `clearRefinementsFromState()`

* feat(clearAll): support `clearsQuery` boolean

* feat(connectMenu): implement `showMore` logic

* chore(dev.demo): add jquery example of menu with show more

* refactor(connectMenu): use `.slice` instead of `_.take`

* refactor(connectMenu): validate usage of `showMoreLimit`

* refactor(menu/RefinementList): use showMore logic from `connectMenu`

* fix(connectMenu): configure correctly `maxValuesPerFacet`

* refactor(connectMenu): remove `currentRefinement`

* test(RefinementList): update to new showMore behaviour

* test(widgets.menu): update snapshot

* test(connectMenu): showMore logic

* fix(pagination): call `refine()` with `pageNumber` 🐛

* feat(connectHierarchicalMenu): provide `items[i].value` to refine

* feat(connectMenu): provide `items[i].value` to refine

* fix(widgets): incorrect prop passed to `<RefinementList />`

* feat(numericRefinementList): provide `items[i].value` to refine

* feat(refinementList): provide `items[i].value` to refine

* feat(starRating): provide `items[i].value` to refine

* refactor(RefinementList): remove `attributeNameKey` prop

* test: comply to new `items[i].value` to refine API

* refactor(hierarchicalMenu): rename `path` -> `value` && `name` -> `label`

* refactor(menu): rename `name` -> `label && `path` -> `value`

* refactor(numericRefinementList): use encoded `start, end` for `items[i].value`

* feat(refinementList): rename `items[i].name` -> `items[i].label`

* fix(Selector): invalid `propTypes` definitions

* `currentValue` can be null/empty
* `options[i].value` can be null/empty

For instance `hit-per-page-selector` have default value of null

* fix(refinementList): pass fn for `searchFacetValues`

* fix(<RefinementListItem />): incorrect propTypes for `facetValue.value`

For instance, when it's using `toggle` widget there's no value to refine

* chore(connectClearAll): rename clearAll() to refine()

* fix(connectRefinementList): update vanilla example

* doc(connectClearAll): add comment about caching function reference

* test(clear-all): un-comment line

* feat(current-refinened-values): `clearRefinement()` -> `refine()`

* refactor(refinement-list): dont create new function, provide `undefined`

* test(numericRefinementList): `isRefined: true` after `refine(item)`

* test(connectHitsPerPage): `.toMatchSnapshot()` on rendering options

* doc(connectCurrentRefinedValues): default `clearsQuery` to `false`

* refactor(dev/jquery/searchBox): simplify example

* feat(currentRefinedValues): provide `computedLabel` default to `name`

* refactor(dev/jquery/clearAll): simplify implementation
